marketData.fsbo: Yes - subject was marketed as FSBO, under contract within 1 day

improvements.specialFeatures: Great room fireplace, shiplap fireplace with built-ins, beam vaulted ceilings, walk-in pantry, wet bar in basement
improvements.ceilings: Beam vaulted ceilings in great room, kitchen, and primary suite; 9-foot ceilings
improvements.kitchen: Custom kitchen with quartz counters, stainless appliances, walk-in pantry, island, eating area
improvements.basement: Full - finished with family room, kitchenette, full bathroom, two bedrooms, wet bar
improvements.flooring: Hardwood throughout most of main floor

neighborhood_description.title: Neighborhood Description
neighborhood_description.text: The subject neighborhood is bordered to the North by Newgate Street, to the South by North Huff Road, to the East by Cedar Avenue, and to the West by Prairie Trail. The subject is located in a neighborhood on the southside of Downs, IL. It is a single family detached ranch style house. It conforms to most other existing homes in the neighborhood in design, quality, and condition. The area is within a mile of schools, recreation, shopping, and centers of employment.

market_conditions.title: Market Conditions
market_conditions.text: Fixed rate and ARM financing is readily available for qualified borrowers. Rates have remained stable in the last few months. The area employment remains above average. Local market conditions are considered average. Typical marketing times are under 30 days. Neighborhood appeal is good. Typical sales do involve seller paid concessions. Supply and demand are considered in balance.

site_description.title: Site Description
site_description.text: The subject is situated on a corner lot and has metal fencing along the side and rear property lines. The site is level. There are no adverse conditions affecting the property or its marketability that were observed during the inspection.

improvements_condition.title: Improvements / Condition
improvements_condition.text: C3;Kitchen-original;Bathrooms-original;The improvements are well maintained and feature limited physical depreciation due to normal wear and tear. Some components, but not every major building component, may be updated or recently rehabilitated. The structure has been well maintained.

adverse_conditions.title: Adverse Conditions / External Factors
adverse_conditions.text: There are no apparent adverse site conditions, encroachments, environmental conditions, or land uses. The subject appears to have no adverse conditions that would affect the livability, soundness, or structural integrity of the improvements.

functional_utility.title: Functional Utility
functional_utility.text: The subject features three above grade bedrooms, two above grade bathrooms, great room fireplace, shiplap fireplace with built-ins, beam vaulted ceilings, walk-in pantry, wet bar in basement, finished basement with family room, kitchenette, full bathroom, two bedrooms, attached three-car garage, covered porch, and metal fencing.

functional_utility_conformity.title: Functional Utility / Conformity
functional_utility_conformity.text: The subject property generally conforms to most other homes in the neighborhood in functional utility, style, condition, use, and quality of construction.

highest_best_use.title: Highest & Best Use
highest_best_use.text: The subject property is a residential single family detached ranch style house located in a suburban neighborhood of Downs, IL. The site appears to be large enough to support the existing improvements and allow for future development similar to the current land use. Based on the property's zoning, it appears that the highest and best use of the site is for residential development. The subject meets the criteria of highest and best use.

sca_summary.title: Sales Comparison Summary
sca_summary.text: All comparables have been found in the subject's neighborhood on the southside of Downs, IL and were selected to demonstrate the marketability of houses of a similar location, design, age, quality, condition, GLA, room count, and basement finish. Due to recent market trends the comparables have received a market time adjustment of 5.0% based on the sales statistics chart included in this report. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its condition, GLA, patio, and fence. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its site size, age, GLA, and basement finished room count. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its site size, age, condition, GLA, bathroom count, basement finished room count, and fence. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of market value.

sales_comparison_commentary.title: Sales Comparison Commentary
sales_comparison_commentary.text: All comparables have been found in the subject's neighborhood on the southside of Downs, IL and were selected to demonstrate the marketability of houses of a similar location, design, age, quality, condition, GLA, room count, and basement finish. Due to recent market trends the comparables have received a market time adjustment of 5.0% based on the sales statistics chart included in this report. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its site size, age, condition, basement finished room count, and fireplace. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its site size, age, GLA, lack of a finished basement, and fireplace. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its site size, age, GLA, lack of a finished basement, and fireplace. After adjustments are made the comparables provide a good basis for an estimate of market value.

reconciliation.title: Reconciliation
reconciliation.text: The greatest weight is applied to the Sales Comparison Approach. It provides the best indication to market value. The Cost Approach was not developed at the request of the lender. However, information is held in the appraiser's file to complete the Cost Approach if required. The Income Approach was not developed due to the lack of market data. The appraisal is made with the subject in 'as is' condition. There is no personal property included in the final estimate of value.

scope_of_work.title: Scope of Work
scope_of_work.text: The scope of the appraisal includes an on-site inspection of the subject property, a detailed measurement and description of the physical characteristics of the property, and an analysis of the real estate market and neighborhood in which the property is located. The appraisal also includes an analysis of comparable property sales, an estimate of the property's highest and best use, and an opinion of market value. The property is a residential dwelling and meets the definition of a "existing" property as it has been constructed and is currently habitable.

conditions_of_appraisal.title: Conditions of Appraisal
conditions_of_appraisal.text: The appraisal is made with the subject in 'as is' condition. There is no personal property included in the final estimate of value.

contract_analysis.title: Contract Analysis
contract_analysis.text: The Residential Sales Contract lists the contract price as [INSERT contract_price]. Sales concessions are typical for the market area and have not significantly impacted the sale price.

prior_sales_subject.title: Prior Sales / Listing History
prior_sales_subject.text: The subject property has not sold in the past 36 months. All previous sales of the comparable properties have been reported. All sales appear to reflect arms length transactions for the period which the sale occurred.
